steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures at the boundary
steps.content:
Left of blank: the most prestigious is an adjective phrase (needing a noun).
Right of blank: the Nobel Prize in Literature is a noun phrase.

steps.title: Apply the colon rule
steps.content:
A colon correctly introduces an elaboration or example that follows.

Choice C supplies “award for a person of letters” to complete the adjective phrase, then uses a colon between two noun phrases: the award described and the Nobel Prize as its specific example.

A semicolon (A) incorrectly tries to separate two noun phrases instead of independent clauses, and choices B and D create ungrammatical word order.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
